prerequisites: A free News API account, created at https://newsapi.org/register.
A News API key obtained from your account dashboard after registering (free during development).
A `category` value, one of: business, entertainment, general, health, science, sports, technology.
A `country` value as a 2-letter ISO 3166-1 code (for example, us).
A `sort_by` value, one of: relevancy, popularity, publishedAt.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: News API uses simple API-key authentication. Supply your key in the `api_key` field. News API accepts the key as the `apiKey` query parameter, the `X-Api-Key` header, or the `Authorization` header; the vendor recommends a header so the key is not exposed in logs. A failed key returns HTTP 401 Unauthorized.

setupSteps.title: Register for a News API account
setupSteps.body: Go to https://newsapi.org/register and sign up for a free account. Keys are free while you are in development.

setupSteps.title: Copy your API key
setupSteps.body: After registering, copy the API key shown in your account. Paste it into the connector's `api_key` field.

setupSteps.title: Choose the headlines filters
setupSteps.body: Set the required `category` (business, entertainment, general, health, science, sports, technology) and `country` (2-letter ISO 3166-1 code, for example us). Note that News API does not allow mixing the `sources` parameter with `country`/`category`.

setupSteps.title: Configure search and sorting
setupSteps.body: Set the required `sort_by` to one of relevancy, popularity, or publishedAt. Optionally set `search_query` for keyword search, and `search_in` to restrict the query to title, description, or content.

setupSteps.title: Narrow sources and date range (optional)
setupSteps.body: Optionally limit results with `sources` (comma-separated source identifiers, max 20), `domains` and `exclude_domains` (comma-separated domains such as bbc.co.uk, techcrunch.com), `language` (2-letter ISO-639-1 code), and `start_date`/`end_date` (ISO 8601 dates that map to News API's from/to).

sources.title: Top headlines endpoint - News API documentation
